Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x1700 "MANCOPTER-2900-1700" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$36 sta $01 jsr $2900 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Mancopter (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $2900 to set the upper two bits of the processor port data direction register ($00) to true (making it #$EF). This prevents the game from trashing memory and crashing.
